retry_reason: This is a put wrapper; retrying would cause a double-free, and the operation never fails in a retryable way.
contract_summary: This is a release (put) wrapper that frees the socket buffer (skb). It unconditionally calls dev_kfree_skb_any to decrement the reference count and, if it reaches zero, free the skb. The caller must not use the skb after calling this function. There is no return value or failure indication; the operation always succeeds and is irreversible.
